name: Election to Reduce Basis in Depreciable Property

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers with excluded discharge of indebtedness income under section 108, particularly for qualified real property business indebtedness or insolvency.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can elect to reduce the basis of depreciable property instead of reducing other tax attributes when debt is discharged, effectively deferring tax liability.
